title: DuckGamma
body:
# **DuckGamma** | Simple Night Vision
 A lightweight, "one-command" plugin that provides instant visibility in the dark. Perfect for survival and cave exploration without the need for torches or potions.

 Core Features
## Single Command: Everything is handled via /gamma.

Instant Toggle: Instantly switches between full brightness and vanilla lighting.

Lag-Free: Optimized code that doesn't impact server performance.

No-Flicker: Provides a smooth visual experience without the "potion fog" effect.

# Usage
/gamma – Toggles Night Vision on or off for the player.
